stories.title: Increase cookie consent button contrast on mobile
stories.description: In src/ui/src/components/CookieConsent.jsx, the 'Accept all' button uses a dark green that's hard to read on the dark background on mobile. Change to bg-green-500 text-white (or bg-green-600 text-white) for high contrast. The 'Essential only' outline button should use border-gray-400 text-gray-200 instead of the current low-contrast variant. The 'Settings' button should use text-gray-300 for readability. GitHub issue #404.
acceptance_criteria: Accept all button clearly readable on dark background
Essential only button border visible on dark background

stories.title: Fix footer link column spacing on mobile
stories.description: In src/ui/src/components/Footer.jsx, the CONTENT and LEGAL footer link columns have uneven spacing on mobile — 'Press releases' wraps awkwardly. Add consistent vertical spacing: space-y-1 on mobile links, ensure both columns have equal gap. If columns stack on mobile, add mb-4 between them. GitHub issue #405.
acceptance_criteria: Footer links evenly spaced on mobile
Press releases text doesn't wrap awkwardly
CONTENT and LEGAL columns aligned when stacked
